description: Gold eval set. Each case pairs a real candidate (data/applicants/<candidate>.json) with an eval-only job (evals/jobs/<job>.json). Expected decisions derive from the candidate's live TEA certification (captured offline in evals/fixtures/tea) vs the job's required subject/grade. These jobs are NOT listed on the deployed website (no overlap).

cases.why: Generalist / Mathematics / ESL — no Social Studies 7-12 certification for a history/coach role
Core Subjects EC-6 — no Social Studies 7-12 certification
ESL Generalist 4-8 — no Social Studies certification
No SPED certification; Mathematics 4-8 does not cover the required SPED + Math 8-12
No SPED certification and no secondary math certification
Core Subjects EC-6 covers grades 3-6 mathematics
Core Subjects EC-6 covers grades 3-6 mathematics
No Texas certificate found in the TEA registry (hard-gate ineligible)
